params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-to-1 multiplexer with an enable signal. When the enable (EN) signal is deasserted, the module selects between four possible outputs based on the 2-bit selector (SEL): if SEL is 00, output B; if SEL is 01, output A; if SEL is 10 or 11, output a HIGH signal (1s). When the enable signal is asserted, the output is consistently a HIGH signal regardless of the selector input.
